description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a central courtyard garden, visible from multiple rooms. The structure is single-story with a flat roof, large windows, and sliding glass doors that open to a patio and pool area. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray and white, with dark accents around windows and doors. The front entrance is marked by a set of steps and double doors, flanked by circular decorative elements. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious outdoor living area, complete with a pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped greenery. The interior is divided into private bedrooms, communal living spaces, and utility rooms, all arranged around the central courtyard.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, central courtyard, large windows, and a poolside patio. The design features open-plan living spaces and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, double doors, circular wall accents, and the central courtyard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the private bedroom areas, utility rooms, and a glimpse of the pool and outdoor lounge.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, car parking area, and the pool with adjacent patio seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, outdoor dining area, and the extensive use of glass for indoor-outdoor connectivity.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
